app.name: OIKOS Hub
app.description: Multi-church system for bulletins, worship services, teams, and community management

login.syncDescription: We are validating your profile and linking your account.
login.signUpDescription: Create your account with the same email approved by administration
login.firstAccessHintBody: An administrator must approve your email first. After that, you can create your account here or sign in with Google/Microsoft using the same email.
login.expiredSession: Your session expired. Sign in again to continue.
login.pendingAccess: Your access has not been approved yet.
login.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
login.signUpSuccess: Account created. If email confirmation is enabled, finish confirmation and then sign in normally.

history.title: Previous bulletins
history.empty: No previous bulletins are available for this church.
history.loadHistoryError: Could not load previous bulletins right now.
history.invalidJson: Could not read the server response.

publicRequests.name: Your name
publicRequests.subject: Subject
publicRequests.chooseChurchHint: First choose the church from the public bulletin. Then come back to send your request.
publicRequests.churchNotFound: We could not find a public church for this link.
publicRequests.success: Request sent successfully to {church}. The team will care for you with attention.

invites.disabledDescription: This link can no longer be used because the invite flow was removed from the system.
